sections.paragraph:
ἀπαφρίζω (ἀφρίζω ‘to foam’; Galen, CMG V 4, 2 p. 120, 3; 125, 21; Oribas. 5, 33, 4; Geopon. 8, 29; 32) cast off like foam τὶ Jd 13 v.l.—DELG s.v. ἀφρός.

Galen Galen , II a.d.—List 5

CMG CMG = Corpus Medicorum Graecorum—List 5

Geopon Geopon , a collection of older material, X a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 99
